YouTube Templates

All Templates in YouTube Templates

Use these templates as ready-to-copy prompts, then adjust details to your audience and goals.

YouTube Script Template

Build clear, retention-focused scripts for educational or marketing videos.

Generate click-worthy title variations based on search intent.

Generate hooks that capture attention in the first 10 seconds.

Create a clear outline with beats, sections, and CTAs.

YouTube Retention Script Template

Write retention-focused scripts with open loops and pacing cues.

YouTube Call-to-Action Template

Write clear CTAs that drive comments, likes, and subscriptions.

Define positioning, visual style, and content pillars.

Plan series arcs with episode ideas, hooks, and CTAs.
